items.summary: Audit and fix all compilation errors in `backend/main.mo` and `backend/migration.mo` so the Motoko actor compiles cleanly. Verify that: stable storage declarations are syntactically correct, all imported modules resolve, and the `addRecord`, `getAllRecords`, and `getRecordById` endpoints have valid type signatures matching the HealthRecord shape (age, bmi, bloodPressure, glucose, hemoglobin, cholesterol, gender, smoker, riskScore, riskLevel, timestamp). The backend must compile without errors before deployment.

Audit and fix all TypeScript compilation errors in the frontend so the build pipeline completes successfully. Specifically: ensure `frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts` correctly maps the backend Candid interface for `addRecord` and `getAllRecords`; ensure the `HealthRecord` TypeScript type exactly matches all backend fields; and ensure `RiskPredictor.tsx`, `Dashboard.tsx`, `History.tsx`, and `XRayAnalysis.tsx` all compile without type errors. The `npm run build` command must succeed with zero errors.
